assets.alt: Flat head-on capture note becoming a public post surface on a peach and apricot mesh background
assets.caption: Useful employee LinkedIn posts start with captured expertise, not a blank prompt.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1897x829 landscape crop
Source context from article: A B2B team can turn employee expertise into LinkedIn posts by starting with one real work moment, not a blank content prompt. Capture what the employee saw, what they decided, what they would warn a buyer about, and why it matters. Then shape that into one buyer question, check claims and confidentiality risk, and preserve enough of the employee's language that the post still sounds like a person with direct experience.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from that article context: captured expertise becoming a useful public post. Use one or two relevant visual elements only: one front-facing flat capture note transforming into one flat public post surface with a simple arrow. Since the article is specifically about LinkedIn posts, a post-like surface is allowed, but it must not mimic exact LinkedIn UI.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shapes. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1897x829. One centered head-on graphic with quiet space around it. All glass/white graphics must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only peach and apricot. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: Two simple front-facing flat liquid-glass surfaces: a small capture note and a larger public post-like surface, connected by one simple white arrow. Sparse non-readable white lines only. No exact LinkedIn UI.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, numbers, charts, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
